nodes.body: <<FILL role=setup words=130 beats='Mira misses the last bus home and the fog swallows the headland where the Hollow Lighthouse has stood dark since old keeper Ferris vanished a year ago; tonight a pale light flickers in its lamp room though no one lives there; four ways lead in from the mist, the keeper's cottage, the tower stair to the lamp, the sea caves under the rock, and the leaning old boathouse'>>

choices.label: Climb the tower stair to the lamp room.
Slip into the sea caves under the rock.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=105 beats='the keeper's cottage is cold and still, a mug of tea long gone to dust on the table; three places look worth a search, the roll-top desk under the window, the wall of crowded shelves, and the dead ash of the hearth'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the roll-top desk rolls back with a groan; the last log page lies open mid-sentence, and a small drawer beneath is locked fast'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the final entry stops halfway, the keeper writing of a light he never lit and footsteps on the shore; the words trail toward the tower door at the end of the hall'>>

choices.label: Follow the hall toward the tower.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=95 beats='the drawer will not give; a bent letter-opener could pick it, or Mira could simply wrench it open and risk splitting the old wood'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the lock clicks and the drawer slides free, holding a brass key wrapped in oilcloth and a folded hall plan marked toward the tower'>>

choices.label: Take the key and follow the plan.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the shelves are heavy with ships in bottles and a long row of leather logbooks; one bottle hides a rolled note, and one logbook spine is worn from handling'>>

choices.label: Uncork the ship in the bottle.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the little ship pops loose and a curl of paper falls out, a sketch of the tower with a hidden door inked at its foot; the hall runs that way'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the worn logbook falls open to a pressed sprig of sea-holly and a margin note in the keeper's hand, follow the hall when the light burns wrong'>>

choices.label: Take the note down the hall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='the cold hearth is full of pale ash; something square did not burn, and one firebrick sits loose and off its line'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='half a scorched photograph survives the ash, the keeper on the gallery beside a stranger who should not be there; the print points her toward the tower'>>

choices.label: Carry the photo to the hall.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='behind the loose brick is a shallow cavity with a cloth bundle just in reach, but the brick jams half-out and pinches her fingers'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the bundle holds an oilcloth-wrapped brass key stamped with the tower's mark; the hall to the tower door beckons'>>

choices.label: Follow the hall with the key.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='the hall runs toward the tower's inner door, but a side passage leads to the dark kitchen where a draught stirs; either way ends at the same locked door'>>

choices.label: Go straight to the tower door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the kitchen draught comes from a gap behind the pantry; following it brings Mira right back to the tower's inner door from the other side'>>

choices.label: Step up to the tower door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=95 beats='the tower's inner door stands ajar on darkness; on a hook beside it hangs a battered journal she almost misses, the keeper's own'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='the tower stair spirals up to the lamp room where the pale light pulses without heat or flame; three things pull at Mira, the great glass lens, the narrow gallery walk outside, and the clockwork weight that once turned the lamp'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=100 beats='up close the lens is not lit at all; a cracked panel throws the glow, and behind it a second reflector has been fitted where none should be'>>

choices.label: Reach behind to the hidden reflector.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='through the crack she sees the glow comes from below, not the lamp, a light climbing the shaft in the tower's heart; the stair leads down to it'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the hidden reflector is angled to bounce a light up from deep in the tower, a trick, not a ghost; the down stair is where the trick begins'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='the gallery walk rings the lamp room in the open fog; the iron rail is furred with rust, and the mist below hides the drop to the rocks'>>

choices.label: Peer through the fogged window instead.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=95 beats='one foot on the walk and the rail shivers under her hand; it might hold for a careful circuit, or it might not'>>

choices.label: Trust the rail and edge along.
Feel the rail groan and shrink back.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='through the streaked window Mira spots a glow leaking from a grille at the tower's base; whatever makes the light is far below the lamp'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='the clockwork weight hangs on a rust-stiff chain that once drove the turning lamp; winding it might wake the mechanism, or she could follow the chain down its shaft'>>

choices.label: Follow the chain down its shaft.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the mechanism grinds a quarter-turn and a hatch drops open in the floor, showing the stair that winds down into the tower's core'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the chain runs down a narrow shaft to a landing far below; a maintenance stair beside it offers the safer way down'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='the way down splits, the main spiral stair curling into the dark, or a cramped service hatch that drops more directly toward the base'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the spiral stair delivers Mira to a low landing at the tower's foot, where a battered journal lies open on a stool, the keeper's own'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the service hatch drops her onto the same low landing, and there on a stool sits the keeper's battered journal, left open'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=108 beats='below the rock the sea caves breathe with the tide, cold and echoing; three ways open off the entrance pool, a wet passage running inland, a shelf of glimmering tide pools, and a low arch carved with old marks'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='the passage narrows and the water at her boots is climbing; she can push deeper while the way is clear, or the rising tide may cut her off'>>

choices.label: Feel the water rise and hesitate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the passage opens above the tideline onto a dry ledge and a flight of slick steps cut into the rock, climbing toward the tower's base'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='the tide pools glow faintly with clinging weed, the same pale colour as the tower's light; one pool holds a dull gleam of metal under the water'>>

choices.label: Fish out the gleam of metal.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the weed glows cold in her palm, harmless, the very thing that paints the ghostly light; a rope handrail leads up from the pools toward the rock stair'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the metal is a keeper's brass tide-badge on a chain, dropped and lost; beyond the pool a rock stair climbs out of the cave'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='the arch is scratched with tally marks and a warning in the keeper's shorthand; a narrow gap beyond it might be squeezed through'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the marks count nights of a light that was never logged; the shorthand points to a stair up and out, away from the rising sea'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='the gap is tight and cold; she can wriggle through to the far chamber, or feel her shoulders wedge and think better of it'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='the cave stair brings her under the tower at last; two ways up remain, the slick worn steps or an old iron ladder bolted to the wall'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the worn steps end at a low landing inside the tower's base, where a battered journal rests on a stool, the keeper's own, left open'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the iron ladder lets her up into the same low landing, and there is the keeper's battered journal on its stool, open to the last page'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=106 beats='the leaning boathouse smells of tar and old rope; three things catch her eye, a beached dinghy under a tarp, a battered tool locker, and a loft up a rickety ladder'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='under the dinghy's tarp are bundled oilskins and, tucked in the bow, a bailing tin that rattles with something that is not water'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='beneath the oilskins is a chart of the coast with a passage inked under the lighthouse; a floor hatch in the corner leads that way'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the tin holds a brass key and a scrap reading, the light is not a ghost, it is a signal; the corner hatch drops toward the tower'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='the tool locker holds a neat coil of rope and a rusted storm lantern still half full of oil, either handy for the dark below'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='with the rope looped over her shoulder Mira spots a floor hatch worn smooth by boots, the way down toward the tower'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='the lantern catches on the third strike, throwing a warm ring of light; its glow finds a boot-worn floor hatch in the corner'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='the loft ladder is missing rungs; she can pick her way up carefully, or trust a cracked rung that looks ready to give'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the loft holds coils of signal flags and a diagram of lamp flashes; a trapdoor at the back drops back down beside the floor hatch'>>

choices.label: Drop down to the floor hatch.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='the floor hatch is stiff; she can pry it up and follow the passage under the boathouse toward the tower, but the wind is worrying the loose door behind her'>>

choices.label: Pry the hatch and go down.
Turn as the door slams in the wind.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the passage runs under the rock to a low landing at the tower's base, where the keeper's battered journal waits open on a stool'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='BOTTLENECK: whichever way Mira came, every path meets here at the keeper's hidden journal; its pages hold three tangled threads, entries about the wrong-burning light, a ledger of night cargoes that were never declared, and a rough sketch of a tunnel beneath the tower'>>

choices.label: Read the entries about the light.
Study the ledger of night cargoes.
Trace the sketch of the tunnel.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='the light entries grow uneasy, a glow that climbs the tower when no lamp is lit; two pages stand out, a careful description and a column of odd dates'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the keeper writes that the light is real but made, not haunted, and that its source lies below; the note ends, take the hidden stair'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the odd dates all fall on foggy nights, the very nights the ledger lists cargoes; the pattern points down the hidden stair'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='both threads agree, the answer is below; a panel in the landing wall swings back on a cramped stair leading up into the tower's core'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='the ledger lists barrels and crates landed on dark nights and signed with a single initial that is not the keeper's; the figures and the names both invite a closer look'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='the figures do not balance, goods that came in and never left; but one whole page has been torn out at the root'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='Mira copies the crooked totals into her own notebook, proof that someone used the dark tower as a store; the trail leads to the hidden stair'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the torn page is folded inside the back cover, naming a hidden store reached from the stair in the tower's core'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the coded names unpick into a single smuggler who paid the keeper to look away, then wanted the tower for himself; the stair is the way to the truth'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='the ledger points up the hidden stair in the core; a low cellar door tempts her too, though its lock looks meant to stay shut'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='the sketch shows a tunnel running from beneath the tower out under the sea gate; a loose flagstone in this very landing is marked with the same cross'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the sketch labels a hidden stair as the only dry way to the tunnel; the panel in the landing wall matches the drawing exactly'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='the flagstone rocks but is set fast with rust and age; she can heave at it, or give up and take the drier route the sketch marks'>>

choices.label: Give up and read the sketch instead.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='either way the sketch wins, the dry route is the hidden stair; the wall panel stands open on a cramped climb into the core'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=108 beats='BOTTLENECK: all three threads bring Mira to the hidden stair in the tower's core, the keeper's secret climb toward the light; it forks into a tight winding stair and a set of outer steps open to the fog'>>

choices.label: Climb the outer steps in the fog.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='the winding stair is dark and close, each step worn to a dish; most are firm, but one near the top sounds hollow underfoot'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='keeping to the wall side of each step, Mira climbs clear to a small door of frosted glass, warm with the pale light beyond'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='the outer steps hug the tower in the open fog, cold and slick; the wind gusts hard enough to make her wait for a lull'>>

choices.label: Wait for the wind to drop.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='she presses to the stone until the gust dies, then climbs on; the steps end at a frosted glass door glowing softly'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the outer steps deliver her, breathless, to the frosted glass door where the pale light waits just behind'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='BOTTLENECK: behind the frosted door lies the source of the ghostly light, a small chamber where a shuttered lantern and a rig of angled mirrors throw a pale glow up the tower, dressed with the glowing cave-weed; it is a made light, a signal, not a haunting; three ways lead down toward the tunnel, a stone stair, a service shaft, and an outer ladder'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='the stone stair is broad and safe; a cupboard on the landing is stuffed with the keeper's things, spare parts and a folded coat'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the stone stair winds down past the lamp-rig to a damp undercroft where the tunnel mouth yawns dark and cool'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='the cupboard holds a spare lens and the keeper's own storm coat, still smelling of pipe smoke; both feel like clues left behind'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='the spare lens is scored with the same rig-marks as the mirrors, proof the light was built by hand; the stair drops on to the tunnel'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='the coat pocket gives up a folded note in the keeper's hand, gone but not lost; the stair carries her down to the tunnel mouth'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='the service shaft drops straight down on iron staples; a knotted rope hangs beside it, and she cannot be sure which will bear her'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the iron staples hold and Mira climbs down into the undercroft, where the tunnel opens off into the dark'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='she leans her weight on the rope; the first fibres creak, and she must judge whether to trust it or the staples'>>

choices.label: Feel it fray and pull back.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='the outer ladder runs down the tower's flank in thick fog; the rungs are wet and the mist is closing until she can barely see her hands'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='hand under hand through the murk, Mira reaches the foot of the tower and ducks into the cool mouth of the tunnel'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=118 beats='BOTTLENECK: every descent meets at the tunnel beneath the lighthouse, a low brick passage running out under the rock toward the sea; it branches three ways, toward a sealed door the keeper's sketch calls his own room, toward a store stacked with unmarked crates, and toward a barred sea gate where the tide sighs in'>>

choices.label: Go toward the sealed keeper's door.
Go toward the barred sea gate.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='the sealed door is oak bound in brass, the keeper's mark burned into it; a heavy beam has fallen across the passage just before it'>>

choices.label: Try the brass key on the door.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='the brass key slides into the lock and turns halfway, then jams on rust; it will need coaxing, or a harder shove'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the lock gives with a soft clunk and the keeper's door swings inward on the small sealed room beyond'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=90 beats='the key sticks fast; forcing it might snap the old wards, or she can breathe, ease it back, and try again'>>

choices.label: Ease it back and re-seat the key.
Force it and risk the wards.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='the fallen beam blocks the way; she can lever it clear with care, or drop and squeeze through the narrow gap beneath it'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='the store is stacked to the brick roof with crates and barrels, none of them stamped; a locked ledger box sits on the topmost crate'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the crate is full of untaxed lamp oil and fine cloth, a smuggler's haul hidden in a dead man's tower; a low door leads on to the keeper's room'>>

choices.label: Go on to the keeper's room.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the ledger box matches the torn page from the journal exactly, sealing the case; a low door leads deeper toward the keeper's room'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='the low door opens on the passage to the keeper's sealed room, but her borrowed lantern gutters low and threatens to leave her dark'>>

choices.label: Press on before the lantern dies.
Stop to trim and relight it.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='she trims the wick and the flame steadies; by its light the passage runs straight to the keeper's door'>>

choices.label: Follow the passage to the room.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='the barred sea gate lets the tide breathe in and out; beyond it the open water heaves, and the lower bars are slick and rising with the sea'>>

choices.label: Watch the water climb and think twice.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='the gate grinds open a hand's width, enough to slip through onto a inner ledge; the current tugs, strong and cold'>>

choices.label: Wait for the current to ease.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='she waits out the surge on the ledge, then steps inside where a dry passage climbs to the keeper's sealed room'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=120 beats='BOTTLENECK: all routes end in the keeper's sealed room, snug and dry under the sea; a lamp, a bunk, a desk, and on it a sealed letter that answers everything, the truth of where old Ferris went, the smuggler who drove him out, and the false light he left burning as a warning; now Mira must decide what to do with it all'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='the sealed letter is addressed, to whoever is brave enough to climb; she can read it to the very end, or keep it safe and carry it out unread'>>

choices.label: Read the letter to the end.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=105 beats='the letter tells it plain, Ferris did not vanish, he fled the smuggler's threats and hid inland, leaving the false light so the town would come looking; three things end the page, a map to his cottage, a signed confession of the years he looked away, and a plea to make it right'>>

choices.label: Follow the map to the keeper.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='the map inks a path to a shepherd's cottage on the inland moor; she can go straight to it and find the old keeper, or take word first to the harbour office'>>

choices.label: Take word to the harbour office.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=92 beats='the confession is unflinching, years of small blind eyes turned for a little money, then the night the smuggler wanted everything; reading it, Mira sees exactly who did what, and how to set the record straight'>>

choices.label: Take the confession to the town.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='the plea is simple and human, please tell them I am sorry and please light the tower true; the words settle on Mira like a task handed down, and she knows she will not put it down'>>
<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='Mira decides the letter is not hers to open all the way; she folds it carefully into her coat, its seal unbroken, to place in the right hands when the sun is up'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='the store is the whole case laid bare; she can photograph the crates and ledger as evidence, or follow the passage deeper to where the goods truly end up'>>

<<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='with the crates and ledger box framed on her phone, Mira has proof no one can wave away; she can signal the coastguard now or carry it straight to the harbour master'>>

choices.label: Take it to the harbour master.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='deeper in, the passage opens on a hidden hoard the smuggler stashed for himself; a single jewelled compass sits on top, easy to pocket'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='Mira maps the whole hidden hoard with her phone, crate by crate, so nothing can be denied or lost; it is more than enough to bring the law down on the tower's secret keeper for good'>>

choices.label: Take the record to the authorities.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='the compass is beautiful and would prove everything in an instant; her hand hovers, and she weighs taking it against leaving it be'>>

choices.label: Leave it and photograph it instead.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=98 beats='the false-light rig can still be saved for good use; she can relight the tower as a true lamp again, or study the signal the keeper built to warn passing ships'>>

choices.label: Relight the lamp as a true light.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=94 beats='the old lamp will burn if the mirror is set true and the gears turn clean; she can align the mirror by the keeper's marks, or force the stiff gears to move'>>

choices.label: Set the mirror true by the marks.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=rising words=90 beats='mirror aligned and wick trimmed, the lamp catches and a strong clean beam swings out over the water for the first time in a year'>>

choices.label: Send the light out to sea.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='the signal rig can flash a coded call; she can rig it now to call the coastguard for help, or simply log how the whole clever thing was made'>>

choices.label: Rig it to call for help.
Log the signal for the record.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=choice words=96 beats='the fog is thick and Mira is tired; she can head straight back to town with what she knows, or take a moment to mark the way so others can follow'>>

<<FILL role=rising words=88 beats='Mira takes one last look at the keeper's snug room, then turns for the long foggy walk back to town with the whole strange night stored up in her head, ready to tell in the morning'>>
<<FILL role=choice words=92 beats='she can leave the keeper's journal open on the desk as a signpost, or carry it out and hand it to the town in the morning'>>

choices.label: Leave the journal as a signpost.

nodes.body: <<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='the wrenched drawer splits and jams the desk shut on her sleeve; by the time Mira works free the fog has thickened and she decides the cottage has kept its secrets for tonight, safe but no wiser, and heads out to wait for morning'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='the yanked brick brings a small slide of rubble that seals the cavity and fills the room with dust; coughing, Mira gives up the hearth and settles by the door to wait out the night, unharmed and unsolved'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='the gallery rail groans and sags under her hand and she snatches herself back to safety; the walk is too rotten to trust, so Mira retreats into the lamp room to wait for dawn, shaken but sound'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=88 beats='the tide slides in faster than she guessed and the passage floods to her knees; Mira wades back to a high dry ledge and settles to wait for the water to fall, cold and unsolved but perfectly safe'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='wedged in the narrow gap, Mira breathes out and wriggles carefully back the way she came; the far chamber will keep its secret tonight, and she picks a route out to firmer ground'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='the cracked rung snaps and drops her a short jarring way to the boathouse floor; nothing broken but her pride, Mira decides the loft can wait and limps out to the shore to wait for light'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=88 beats='the wind slams the boathouse door and rattles the whole leaning shed until a shelf of gear comes down across the hatch; Mira judges it too risky tonight and steps out into the fog to head back for town'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=86 beats='the low cellar door gives all at once onto cold blackness and the lantern flame gutters out; rather than grope on blind, Mira eases the door shut and climbs back to the landing to wait for a safer hour'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='the hollow step crumbles under her boot and drops her shin-deep into the stair; Mira hauls herself out, heart pounding, and decides the hidden climb is too far gone to trust tonight'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='the knotted rope frays through in her grip and she catches herself hard against the staples; badly rattled, Mira climbs back up and gives up the shaft, the tunnel unreached this night'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='the fog thickens on the outer ladder until she cannot see the next rung or the ground below; Mira will not climb blind over rocks, so she edges back up and waits for the mist to lift'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=85 beats='she forces the key and the old wards shear with a snap, jamming the keeper's door for good; the sealed room stays sealed, and Mira turns back with the mystery half-told'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=86 beats='halfway under the beam it shifts and settles heavier, pinning her coat until she twists free of it; the near miss is enough, and Mira backs out of the passage to find a safer way another day'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=87 beats='the sea gate's lower bars are already awash and the cold water surges to her waist; Mira wades back to the dry passage and decides the tide has won this round, safe but stopped short'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=88 beats='the compass in her pocket, Mira turns to go and a hidden bell-wire chimes through the tunnel; guilty and flustered, she puts it straight back, and by the time she climbs out the dawn patrol is waiting to ask hard questions, the evidence spoiled by her own hand'>>

<<FILL role=failure words=86 beats='she forces the stiff gears and they lock solid with a crack, jamming the whole lamp mechanism for good; the tower will not light tonight, and Mira climbs down disappointed, the beam still dark over the water'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=100 beats='the moor path leads Mira to a low shepherd's cottage where old Ferris himself opens the door, grey and blinking but alive and well; the vanished keeper is found, the year-long mystery solved from end to end, and together they plan how to set the whole story right; the fullest, brightest ending'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=96 beats='Mira carries the letter and map to the harbour office at first light; within the hour a search party sets out for the moor, and by noon old Ferris is home again, cleared and welcomed, the mystery closed by her word'>>

<<FILL role=success words=95 beats='with the signed confession in hand, Mira makes sure the town learns the truth, that Ferris was threatened, not guilty, and that he left the false light to bring help; his good name is restored and the real culprit named'>>

<<FILL role=success words=92 beats='answering the keeper's plea, Mira vows to see the tower mended and the truth told; she leaves the room a keeper of his trust, and in the weeks that follow she quietly makes every word of it come good'>>

<<FILL role=success words=95 beats='Mira flashes the coded lamp until a coastguard cutter answers out of the fog; by dawn the store is opened, the crates seized, and the smuggler who haunted the tower is caught red-handed, the whole scheme undone'>>

<<FILL role=success words=92 beats='the harbour master listens open-mouthed to Mira's proof, then rouses the constable and the revenue men; the tower's secret store is emptied into the light of day, and the town owes the truth to a girl who missed her bus'>>

<<FILL role=success words=92 beats='Mira records every corner of the hidden hoard without touching a thing, so the evidence stands untouched for the law; when the coastguard comes, her careful photographs seal the case beyond any doubt'>>

<<FILL role=completion words=98 beats='the true lamp swings its clean beam out across the water and, far off, a fishing boat lost in the fog answers with a grateful horn; Mira has given the coast back its light, and the hollow tower is hollow no more'>>

<<FILL role=success words=94 beats='Mira sets the signal flashing its coded call for help, and before long lights answer from the harbour and the sea; the keeper's clever rig, meant as a warning, becomes the thing that finally brings everyone home'>>

<<FILL role=success words=92 beats='Mira logs every mirror and shutter of the keeper's signal until she understands it whole; the ghost light was never a ghost, and her careful record turns a year of fear into a solved and ordinary wonder'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=86 beats='Mira slips the sealed letter into her coat and climbs out into the greying fog, the truth carried safe but unread; she will hand it to the right people in daylight and let them open it, content to have found it at all'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=86 beats='leaving the jewelled compass exactly where it lay, Mira photographs the hoard and climbs out with clean hands; she has not caught anyone tonight, but she has learned what she will and will not do, and walks home wiser'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=86 beats='the fog is too thick and the hour too late; Mira heads back to town with a head full of what she has seen, the mystery not yet solved but no longer hers to fear, and a story she cannot wait to tell by daylight'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=86 beats='Mira leaves the keeper's journal open on the desk like a signpost and marks the tunnel with chalk arrows for whoever comes next; she carries out only what she saw, trusting the grown-ups to follow the trail she has laid'>>

<<FILL role=ending words=86 beats='the keeper's journal goes home under Mira's arm to be handed to the town in the morning; it is proof enough to bring the right people back, and she leaves the deciding of what happens next to older and wiser heads'>>
